clips.name: Pinguinifarellino
clips.lyrics: Ecco Pinguinifarellino! Questa androgina bevoniata di corvi fa deserto di semafori con la cantilena di metallo, allegra e docemente pronta a forzare gli ingranaggi del traffico. Attenzione, viaggiatore intenso: la sua porta di accesso al carburante è più grande della tua corrente!
clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D character render of an anthropomorphic pigeon-Cybertruck fusion, wearing sleek neon yellow sunglasses, expressive big eyes, tiny metallic boots, standing on a sunny highway archway, warm cinematic golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, film grain, charming and cute not scary or uncanny, centered subject, 9:16 portrait.

clips.name: Piccettro Truccino
clips.lyrics: Piccettro Truccino, piccettro truccino! Picci picci in trance, brr brr, tralala, tung tung, sbada bim, la la la! Vento sfreccia, zuce lucente, e la nube risponde, brillante e riderelli, rossa fosca di neon, sempre leggero come un tesserezu!
clips.image_prompt: A hyper-detailed photorealistic 9:16 portrait of a pigeon seamlessly fused with a Cybertruck, where the bird's feathered head and sharp beak grow into the vehicle's chrome grille and LED headlights, its wings tucked across the hood as if in flight, set on a misty downtown street under a warm golden-hour glow, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, surreal yet charming, centered subject.

clips.prompt: three unexpected facts about the octopus
